projects.description: Record things you successfully avoided wasting time on. Builds streaks for distractions resisted rather than tasks completed.

projects.title: Archery Game
projects.description: A cyberpunk archery simulation with parabolic arrow physics, multi-zone target scoring, wind drift, difficulty levels, and localStorage high-score persistence.

projects.title: Balloon Pop
projects.description: A neon cyberpunk balloon-popping arcade game with procedural float physics, score acceleration, countdown timer, particle burst effects, and localStorage persistence.

projects.title: Block Steak Matrix
projects.description: A modern, minimalist glassmorphic implementation of classic arcade block-stacking logic. Running cleanly within standalone client-side browser layers, the platform instantiates pseudo-random geometric tile cluster structures cascading down an indexed vertical grid tracking column. Players manipulate coordinates using matrix rotation algorithms centered around an index axis, sliding setups horizontally while checking for boundary axis constraints. Completed solid rows are parsed instantly to compute line cleanses and add score point increments, backed natively by local storage arrays.

projects.title: Blog
projects.description: A full-featured blog application built with React, Vite, Appwrite, Redux Toolkit, and TinyMCE. Supports authentication, post creation, editing, deletion, image uploads, protected routes, and dark mode.

projects.title: Book Library
projects.description: A premium, glassmorphic reading progress tracker and collections shelf manager using localStorage.

projects.title: Brick Breaker Arcade Game
projects.description: A cyberpunk-themed canvas arcade game with multi-tier brick breaking, directional paddle deflection physics, score tracking, and localStorage high-score persistence.

projects.title: Browser Whiteboard
projects.description: An interactive drawing board using HTML5 Canvas with adjustable brush sizes, a color picker, light/dark mode, and image export.

projects.title: Calendar And Scheduling App
projects.description: An interactive organizational grid application featuring real-time date compilation, localized monthly display matrices, categorized event registration streams, and dynamic chronological agenda views.

projects.title: Candy Collector
projects.description: A neon arcade candy-collection game with falling candies and bombs, AABB collision detection, combo scoring, progressive difficulty, and localStorage best-score persistence.

projects.title: Car Dodger Game
projects.description: A synthwave highway dodge game with parallax scrolling, procedural traffic spawning, AABB collision detection, progressive difficulty, and localStorage best-score persistence.

projects.title: Career Roadmap Planner
projects.description: A responsive career planner allowing users to chart educational journeys (Frontend, Backend, AI/ML, Data Science), track skill acquisition progress, and reference curated documentation links.

projects.title: Chat Room
projects.description: A real-time multi-tab chat room using BroadcastChannel API and localStorage — no server needed.

projects.title: Chroma Match Puzzle
projects.description: An ultra-premium colometric perception trainer built around procedural color variance mathematics and micro-second state loops. Running cleanly inside native browser layout boundaries, the platform models subtle color mutations by applying algorithmic HSL delta steps to construct three decoy cards that closely mirror a central hex specimen target. Features include a Fisher-Yates array shuffling loop mapping choice slots randomly each round, an integrated 5-second linear countdown timer loop, and persistent score caching via LocalStorage vectors.

projects.title: Chrono Sweeper
projects.description: A high-end cyberpunk redesign of the classic minefield sweeper puzzle optimized around high-frequency recursive graph traversals and real-time proximity vector analytics. Running cleanly inside isolated client-side browser layers, the platform instantiates a hidden data array matrix tracking threat coordinate vectors. Selecting cells recalculates proximity counts dynamically, while a strict ticking countdown interval mandates action steps—triggering an automated board explosion canvas animation sequence upon clock expiration or threat intersection.

projects.title: Coding Challenge Tracker
projects.description: An interactive frontend dashboard that helps developers record solved problems, monitor progress across platforms, maintain streaks, track goals, and visualize achievements with full offline data portability.

projects.title: Color Catcher
projects.description: Catch falling objects that match the catcher color while avoiding wrong colors. The game becomes faster as your score increases.

projects.title: Color Guessing Game
projects.description: A high-fidelity, educational web application built to address repository Issue #107. This interactive project strengthens deep client-side understanding of standard CSS layout parameters and structural DOM interactions. It features algorithmic generation maps computing random integer vectors for individual Red, Green, and Blue channels, an option density toggle grid tracking scaling configurations for both Easy Mode and Hard Mode, persistent scoring streaks synced natively via browser LocalStorage parameters, and smooth transition properties controlling card object animations.

projects.title: Color Palette Generator
projects.description: Generate beautiful, harmonious color palettes using color theory. Choose from analogous, complementary, triadic, and more. Lock colors you love and regenerate the rest — copy hex codes instantly.

projects.title: Connect Four Game
projects.description: A classic gravity-drop token connection puzzle. Features a sleek interface, precise multi-directional win-detection logic, and a full-featured tracking dashboard with real-time scorekeeping and match history. Built with semantic HTML, CSS animations, and pure JavaScript for a robust, no-framework performance.

projects.title: Contrast Accessibility Checker
projects.description: A web-based accessibility tool that checks color contrast ratios between foreground and background colors to help ensure compliance with accessibility standards such as WCAG.

projects.title: Corsi Block Tapper
projects.description: An interactive clinical psychological simulation model based on the standardized Corsi Block-Tapping Task protocols used to evaluate visuospatial short-term memory capacity and spatial working memory boundaries. Built completely using client-side native web APIs, the utility structures 9 identical minimalist blocks scattered randomly across an asymmetric, chaotic bounding framework layout. The system orchestrates progressive sequential flash routines, parsing player input choices to track capacity indexes with state metrics saved securely via local browser cache controls.

projects.title: Css Domino Builder
projects.description: An interactive, blueprint-styled architecture sandbox workspace built to run mechanical physics and multi-directional cascade simulations. Users instantiate custom domino configurations on an indexed matrix grid container specifying orientation and vectors. Triggering the chain activates an array-backed proximity crawler engine that calculates adjacent grid steps and schedules fluid, multi-directional kinetic animations via class injection loops and 3D hardware-accelerated CSS perspective matrices.

projects.title: Cycle Grid
projects.description: An ultra-premium, hardware-accelerated 2D canvas simulation built around a high-frequency sub-pixel arcade grid engine. Operating cleanly in native browser environments, the platform implements fluid vector movement driven via sub-millisecond animation loop threads, precise multi-object pixel intersection checks validating crash configurations against boundaries or intersecting trails, an autonomous predictive scanning AI opponent that intercepts trajectories to prevent self-collision while trapping target vectors, and unified LocalStorage presets keeping record statistics intact.

projects.title: Daily Wheels
projects.description: A weighted decision wheel for picking what to eat, watch or do today, with custom SVG graphics and category presets.

projects.title: Developer Portfolio Builder
projects.description: A modern developer portfolio builder with live preview, customizable sections, responsive templates, and export-ready portfolio pages.

projects.title: Digital Clock

projects.title: Dual N Back Lite App
projects.description: An ultra-premium cognitive neuro-training utility based on scientifically proven working memory and fluid intelligence expansion protocols. Running entirely inside native browser layers, the platform pairs an automated synchronized interval timeline flashing blocks on a 3x3 geometric grid with simultaneous alphabetical text character cues. The application implements an array-backed rolling sequence tracking buffer that maps elements exactly N steps backward, custom zero-dependency audio sound wave generation built with native browser Web Audio API Oscillator nodes, and persistent high-score logs stored using LocalStorage parameters.

projects.title: Flashcard Learning App

projects.title: Flow Free Clone

projects.title: Grid Lock
projects.description: An ultra-premium, high-speed mathematical puzzle application designed to test mental agility, constraint satisfaction, and focus control. Engineered using native browser mechanics, the system implements automated combinations tracking across a 4x4 data layout grid populated with randomized integers, structured constraint evaluating parameters, a column gravity cascading algorithm that drops surviving upper integers downward while spawning fresh entries at empty top indexes, and score milestones backed natively via client LocalStorage variables.

projects.title: Habit Tracker

projects.title: Hungama Game

This educational project implements comprehensive client-side string processing operations to track and map character vectors, dynamic real-time SVG path rendering to render scale attempts step-by-step on a vector canvas, a custom 7-column virtual keyboard grid, and local persistence arrays for game win streaks managed via browser LocalStorage parameters.

projects.title: Quntum Chess
projects.description: An ultra-premium, minimalistic strategy simulator introducing core laws of quantum mechanics into microscale chess. Running purely within standalone client-side browser layers, the application models particle dynamics across a 4x4 evaluation matrix grid. Players can execute complex Quantum Moves to split pieces into synchronous parallel superposition board states. The framework triggers automated 50% probability wavefunction collapses when phantom positions are engaged or challenged, resolving spatial coordinates instantly via pure vanilla JavaScript tree arrays without third-party engines.

projects.title: Rain On Window
projects.description: A realistic rainy glass simulation with adjustable rain intensity, lightning flashes, synthesized thunder, and ambient rain sound controls.

projects.description: A millisecond-accurate reaction time measurement tool with 5-state machine logic, anti-cheat false-start shielding, historical attempt logging, and localStorage best-score persistence.

projects.description: A millisecond-accurate reaction time measurement tool with state-machine logic, anti-cheat false-start shielding, historical attempt logging, and localStorage best-score persistence.

projects.title: Real Estate Listing
projects.description: A modern property browsing app with advanced filtering, gallery layouts, and a favorites list saved to local storage.

projects.title: Restaurant Ordering Interface
projects.description: An ultra-premium, zero-dependency restaurant menu browser and ordering interface designed around precise item option customizations, synchronized client cart processing metrics, and structural responsive constraints.

projects.title: Resume Builder Form
projects.description: A dynamic resume builder with real-time preview, dual templates (Classic Minimalist & Modern Professional), customizable accent colors, tag-based skills/languages, photo upload via File Reader API, and print-to-PDF support.

projects.title: Reverse Captcha
projects.description: A highly creative, satirical web application flipping typical internet security checkpoint logic. The platform behaves like a hyper-rigid, literal machine system, challenging human users to confirm their organic identity by passing creative checkpoints. Features include an abstract semantic keyphrase analytical engine parsing custom descriptions, interactive multiple-choice logic measuring humorous interpretation coefficients, and an advanced canvas path coordinate validator checking standard radial standard deviation changes to actively fail smooth, mathematically perfect geometries.

projects.title: Rock Paper Scissors
projects.description: An interactive Rock Paper Scissors game played against the computer featuring real-time score tracking, responsive glassmorphism UI, and smooth custom animations.

projects.title: Shape Builder Puzzle
projects.description: An interactive puzzle game where players draw rectangles/squares originating from numbered cells to cover the board with no overlaps or empty gaps. Features responsive touch handlers and dynamic solver hints.

projects.title: Simon Recall
projects.description: An premium audio-spatial working memory synchronization trainer built around code-generated harmonic frequencies. Built purely with client-side vanilla specifications, the platform renders 4 minimal, elegant monochromatic soundboard modules. The system orchestrates an increasingly long array timeline sequence of distinct symphonic instrument tones produced natively via the browser's Web Audio API oscillator nodes, calculating memory retention ceilings with metrics persisted inside LocalStorage arrays.

projects.title: Simon Says Game
projects.description: An arcade-accurate, high-fidelity browser implementation of the classic Simon Says sensory game loop. Engineered entirely through native client-side infrastructure scripts, the layout implements absolute quadrant grid segment shapes, dynamic glow modifier channels, custom pointer interaction guard blocks, persistent LocalStorage high score counters, and a synthesized live audio rendering track driven natively via the Web Audio API Oscillator engine.

projects.title: Sliding Puzzle Game
projects.description: A 15-puzzle sliding tile game with solvability validation via inversion counting, Manhattan adjacency checks, move/timer tracking, and localStorage best-score persistence.

projects.title: Space Shooter
projects.description: A synthwave space shooter built with HTML5 Canvas and vanilla JavaScript — multi-axis ship controls, plasma lasers, procedural enemy waves, AABB collision detection across multiple arrays, and localStorage persistence.

projects.title: Square Pic
projects.description: A simple tool to convert any uploaded image into a perfect square format with multiple background options including blur, solid color, gradient, and expansion effect.

projects.title: Submit Troll
projects.description: A fun interactive project where the 'Yes' button constantly escapes the cursor. Includes difficulty levels, fake catches, statistics tracking, and mobile support.

projects.title: Subscription Management Dashboard
projects.description: A premium dark finance dashboard for tracking subscriptions with real-time monthly/annual spend, category distribution bars, renewal alerts, and localStorage persistence.

projects.title: Task Management Dashboard
projects.description: An ultra-premium, dependency-free developer workspace platform designed using native web semantics. The architecture incorporates a strict three-column dashboard layouts configuration tracking dynamic statistical counts filters, state modification streams, low/medium/high task urgency hierarchies, a chronological system transaction logger engine, and a structural client-side data persistence layer driven entirely via optimized browser LocalStorage allocations.

projects.title: The Stroop Interference Grid
projects.description: An ultra-premium cognitive control training tool based on the psychological Stroop Effect. The system forces the brain to override automatic processing habits by dynamically altering target evaluation rules each round between text meaning and ink color constraints. Features include high-frequency component position randomization using automated Fisher-Yates array shuffling passes to block muscle memory adaptations, a high-precision 2-second countdown interval timer tracked down to millisecond boundaries, and native client LocalStorage persistence hooks mapping streak records.

projects.title: Tic Tac Toe
projects.description: A premium neon cyberpunk Tic Tac Toe game with Player vs Player and unbeatable AI (Minimax) modes, persistent scoreboard, and animated win detection.

projects.title: Trail Making Lab
projects.description: An interactive diagnostic neuropsychological assessment suite based on the standardized Trail Making Test protocols used to evaluate executive function, cognitive processing speed, and cognitive flexibility. The application dynamically structures a responsive, randomized coordinate sandbox populated with vector target nodes mapping both Part A linear numeric progressions (1-2-3...) and Part B alternating cognitive sets (1-A-2-B...). It tracks real-time path drawing overlays, computing microsecond reaction deltas and incursion collision errors with data backup cached via local browser features.

projects.title: Travel Booking Dashboard
projects.description: An integrated multi-column travel management layout featuring dynamic flight and accommodation routing selectors, client-side filtering grids, and reactive price calculations.

projects.title: Typing Practice App
projects.description: An interactive, glassmorphic typing speedometer helping users scale their typing dexterity via custom timers, dynamic difficulty preset word banks, Web Audio synth haptic feedbacks, and real-time speed progress graphs.

projects.title: Typing Speed Tester
projects.description: Measure typing speed (WPM) and accuracy with a simple web app.

projects.title: URL Shortener UI Simulator
projects.description: A responsive and interactive study tool simulating a URL shortening service with client-side code validation, custom short links generation, copy animations, simulated click redirection logs, and Canvas stats analytics.

projects.title: Vigilance Clock Test
projects.description: A high-fidelity psychological simulation platform based on the historical Mackworth Clock experiment designed to test sustained long-term alertness and cognitive tracking thresholds. Built completely client-side inside standalone browser layers, the utility orchestrates a circular target array grid where a solitary visual marker ticks smoothly along circular layout loops at standard 1-step increments. The engine applies an asynchronous randomized statistical interval probability generator to trigger rare double-jump skips, logging precise user response times and omission profiles via local browser arrays.

projects.title: Virtual Piano Synthesizer
projects.description: An interactive, keyboard-accessible piano simulator using the Web Audio API to synthesize sounds in real-time.

projects.title: Virtual Table Fan Simulator
projects.description: An interactive, high-fidelity mechanical physics simulator modeling aerodynamic properties and angular momentum inside the browser. The platform unifies an acceleration-deceleration inertia tracker with an autonomous sweeping horizontal oscillation engine driven via continuous sub-millisecond timeline loops. To preserve absolute zero-dependency compilation compliance, the suite implements real-time audio sound wave generation modeling wind volume coefficient adjustments running natively via browser Web Audio API oscillator networks.

projects.title: Weather Finder
projects.description: Fetches live weather data from an API and shows temperature and conditions.

projects.title: Weather Forecast Dashboard
projects.description: A responsive weather dashboard showing current conditions and a 5-day forecast using real-time API data.

projects.title: Whack A Mole
projects.description: An arcade-style Whack-A-Mole game featuring Web Audio API retro sounds, satisfying particle effects, progressive speed levels, and high score persistence.

projects.title: Word Scramble Game
projects.description: A timed arcade word puzzle with 20 words, Fisher-Yates shuffling, hints, countdown timer, and persistent high-score tracking via localStorage.

projects.description: A responsive YouTube homepage clone featuring a modern layout, video grid, sidebar navigation, and adaptive design for different screen sizes.
